title: narcissus calcicola subsp. calcicola
intro: Narcissus calcicola subsp. calcicola, also known as the calcicole narcissus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Narcissus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures made from the bulbs and flowers of the plant, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
